title: Saudi Kabanos Sausage Skillet
description: A flavorful and spicy sausage skillet dish inspired by Saudi Arabian cuisine, featuring kabanos sausages and a hint of traditional malty flavors.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium heat.
Cook the kabanos sausages until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the sausages from the skillet and set aside.
Add the malty syrup to the skillet and stir to combine with the pan drippings.
Add the Arabian spices and stir to combine.
Return the kabanos sausages to the skillet and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the kabanos sausages hot with chewy flatbread on the side, if desired.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
